message:
feat(docs,conformance): add DOC-PASS-11/12 behavioral semantics, oracle parity, and E2E orchestration

Documentation expansion (3 files, ~1030 new lines):

EXHAUSTIVE_LEGACY_ANALYSIS.md: Add DOC-PASS-11 (behavioral semantics pass)
defining packet-level behavior contracts for FR-P2C-001 through FR-P2C-009
(event loop, protocol parser, dispatch, ACL, persistence, replication,
cluster, expiry, TLS). Include high-risk claim bindings with strict/hardened
replay commands, expected-loss decision models (S0-S3 states x A0-A3
actions), and one-lever optimization protocols. Add DOC-PASS-12 (red-team
contradiction review) with explicit disposition for all contradictions and
blockedBy relationships to concrete beads.

EXISTING_REDIS_STRUCTURE.md: New oracle reference mapping legacy Redis
subsystems (ae.c, networking.c, server.c, db.c, etc.) to behavioral
requirements. Includes domain-by-domain extraction completeness matrix,
conformance fixture families (protocol_core, string_core, ttl_core,
persist_core, repl_core, security_config_core), drift severity taxonomy
(critical/high/medium/low), and quantitative DOC-PASS-00 expansion targets.

TEST_LOG_SCHEMA_V1.md: New structured logging specification (fr_testlog_v1)
with required/optional fields, replay command templates for unit/property
and E2E tests, golden artifact storage paths, and redaction policy.

Conformance infrastructure (4 code/fixture files, ~750 new lines):

live_oracle_diff.rs: Refactor to structured CliArgs with mode, fixture,
host, port, log_root, json_out fields. Add JSON report generation
(JsonReport/JsonFailure with serde::Serialize). Add directory creation,
comprehensive error reporting, and unit tests for argument parsing.

run_live_oracle_diff.sh: Complete rewrite as deterministic E2E orchestrator
producing self-contained failure bundles (suite_status.tsv, command_trace.log,
live_logs/, per-suite JSON reports, replay_failed.sh, README). Support
--host/--port/--output-root/--run-id flags plus FR_E2E_RUNNER for
local/RCH execution.

adversarial_corpus_v1.json: New adversarial test fixture corpus.
adversarial_triage.rs: New binary for adversarial corpus triage.
run_adversarial_triage.sh: Orchestrator for adversarial testing pipeline.
fixtures/README.md: Document fixture families and oracle orchestrator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+
+### 19.5 Expected-loss decision model (risk/recovery control)
+
+State set:
+- `S0`: parity pass,
+- `S1`: parity drift with deterministic artifact capture,
+- `S2`: execution-path failure (transport/setup/runtime crash),
+- `S3`: nondeterministic/insufficient forensic evidence.
+
+Action set:
+- `A0`: accept run and advance,
+- `A1`: block promotion and file targeted follow-up bead,
+- `A2`: rerun under hardened mode with bounded diagnostics,
+- `A3`: fail closed and escalate with replay bundle.
+
+Loss matrix (lower is better):
+
+| State \ Action | `A0` | `A1` | `A2` | `A3` |
+|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
+| `S0` parity pass | 0 | 2 | 3 | 5 |
+| `S1` deterministic drift | 6 | 1 | 2 | 3 |
+| `S2` execution failure | 8 | 3 | 4 | 1 |
+| `S3` missing forensics | 9 | 4 | 5 | 1 |
+
+Calibration and fallback trigger:
+- calibration metric: agreement between rerun classification and original classification (`>= 0.9` target over rolling window),
+- fallback trigger: if `S2` or `S3` is observed, force `A3` and block promotion until replay bundle is attached to the bead thread.
+

+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+usage() {
+  cat <<'USAGE'
+Usage:
+  ./scripts/run_adversarial_triage.sh [--manifest <path>] [--output-root <dir>] [--run-id <id>] [--runner <rch|local>]
+
+Description:
+  Executes the versioned adversarial corpus through fr-conformance and emits a
+  deterministic triage bundle with failure classification and bead routing.
+USAGE
+}
+
+MANIFEST="${FR_ADV_MANIFEST:-crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/adversarial_corpus_v1.json}"

+RUNNER="${FR_ADV_RUNNER:-rch}"
+
+while (($# > 0)); do
+  case "$1" in
+    --manifest)
+      MANIFEST="${2:-}"
+      shift 2
+      ;;
+    --output-root)
+      OUTPUT_ROOT="${2:-}"
+      shift 2
+      ;;
+    --run-id)
+      RUN_ID="${2:-}"
+      shift 2
+      ;;
+    --runner)
+      RUNNER="${2:-}"
+      shift 2

+- failed_suites: \`${FAILED_COUNT}\`
+
+## Artifact Layout
+
+- \`suite_status.tsv\`: machine-readable suite execution status.
+- \`command_trace.log\`: exact command trace with timestamps.
+- \`live_logs/\`: structured JSONL logs emitted by harness (\`live_log_root\`).
+- \`suites/<suite>/stdout.log\`: captured command output.
+- \`suites/<suite>/report.json\`: machine-readable diff report from \`live_oracle_diff --json-out\`.
+- \`replay_failed.sh\`: deterministic replay commands for failed suites.
+
+## Re-run
 
-echo "running live oracle command diff: core_strings.json"

+\`\`\`bash
+./scripts/run_live_oracle_diff.sh --host ${HOST} --port ${PORT} --run-id ${RUN_ID}
+\`\`\`
